metadata.description: Personalism indicators from Wikidata for all Archigos leaders (post-1945)

indicators.label: Family in Government
indicators.description: ≥2 immediate family members held political office

indicators.label: Places Named After
indicators.description: ≥2 places or institutions named after the leader

indicators.label: Grandiose Titles
indicators.description: Leader holds honorific prefixes, suffixes, or noble titles
